name: Georgia Sally Lunn
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening.
2. Add sugar and continue creaming.
3. Combine the beaten eggs and milk.
4. Alternately add dry ingredients to the mixture with the creaming mixture.
5. Pour the batter into a greased and floured shallow pan.
6. Bake in a hot oven (450 degrees F) for 25 minutes.
7. Cut the baked sallys into 2-inch squares.
8. Serve hot with butter.
9. Makes about 24 pieces.
From Favorite recipes of Colfax Country Club Women, 1946 by Mrs. Young, Colmor
Typed by Ethel Snyder
Date August 17, 1997
